primary_reason: The review evaluates general long-term-care quality indicators without an explicit infectious-disease transfer route.
The project applies needs assessment and workforce surveys to occupational infectious-disease prevention capacity.
Independent chart review validates infection-surveillance reports and identifies case-definition interpretation errors.
This survey assesses vaccine adverse-event surveillance knowledge and barriers during national immunization programs.
